body.en: Red means stop. Give way at crossings and follow priority rules.
body.local: Red means stop. Give way at crossings and follow priority rules.

body.en: Triangles typically warn; circles may indicate mandatory or prohibited actions.
body.local: Triangles typically warn; circles may indicate mandatory or prohibited actions.

body.en: Seatbelts reduce injury. Wear helmets on two-wheelers.
body.local: Seatbelts reduce injury. Wear helmets on two-wheelers.

body.en: Check mirrors, signal early, and ensure the blind spot is clear.
body.local: Check mirrors, signal early, and ensure the blind spot is clear.
